brands.name: Vicky Bakery

statesOpen.note: "South Florida, Southwest Florida, Central Florida, and other major markets across the Sunshine State and Southeast open for development" (verified quote, article dated 2023-03-31)

brands.note: South-Florida concentrated Cuban bakery. CEO told Franchise Times (2023) Florida supports 60-65 stores; after that the brand will look at the Carolinas, Alabama and Texas — those states are future targets, not currently documented as open.

nationwide.note: Accepting inquiries in all 50 states; franchisor press (myvoda.com) describes active 'nationwide expansion' — 100+ owners, 270+ territories across 32 states since 2023.

Available Territories: United States. Official development page wingstop.com/available-markets. High entry bar: $1.2M net worth, ~$204k-$335k liquid, 3-store minimum development agreement; operating in 47 states.

brands.name: XP League
brands.note: No current franchise-availability evidence found. XP League was acquired by Valhallan Esports from Unleashed Brands in late 2025 (franchisetimes.com); its franchise site (xpleaguefranchise.com) is offline (IIS default page / timeouts) and xpleague.com no longer mentions franchise opportunities. Status of new franchise sales post-acquisition is unclear.

nationwide.note: "Franchises are available throughout the United States" with exclusive protected territories. Franchisor site (zivelfranchise.com) sets territory case-by-case and publishes no state list; ~15-22 locations across ~10 states.
